projects.target_audience: Founders, technical directors, and project managers at software development agencies and marketing/digital agencies doing $200K+ revenue.

angles.hook_line: AI made your developers 10x faster. Your scoping process is still stuck in 2019.
angles.target_audience: Technical founders and CTOs at dev agencies who've adopted Copilot/Cursor but haven't touched their pre-build workflow
section_outline: Cold Open — Contrarian claim (15s)
The Problem — Hours spent pre-build vs build (30s)
The Discovery — 5 audits revealed the bottleneck moved upstream (40s)
The Mechanism — 4 agents: transcript → extraction → research → deliverables (45s)
Proof — 200→20 stat, demo walkthrough, social proof (30s)
The Offer — Three tiers, value framing (25s)
Risk Reversal + Close — ROI guarantee, CTA (20s)
angles.source: Market theme #1 (upstream bottleneck) + industry trend data
angles.differentiation: Only angle positioning product as answer to systemic industry shift. Most intellectual, appeals to technically-minded founders.

angles.hook_line: We cut our agency's scoping process from 200 hours to 20. Now you can too — for five grand.
angles.target_audience: Agency founders and ops leads who respond to specific metrics — the 'show me the numbers' buyer
section_outline: Hook — 200→20 stat, mid-thought start (15s)
Agitate — What 200 hours of scoping costs: daily/weekly/annual waste calc (30s)
Prove You Understand — Real agency quotes about scoping pain (30s)
Social Proof — pipeline, YouTube credibility, demo (40s)
Offer / Value Stack — Three tiers with deliverable stack (35s)
CTA / Guarantee — ROI guarantee, qualification, book call (25s)
angles.source: Activation opportunity #1 (200→20 as anchor) + proven VSL template structure
angles.differentiation: Closest to proven Hormozi template. Leads with single strongest metric. Safest bet.

angles.hook_line: You scope for free, pray you win the project, and eat the cost when you don't. There's a fix.
angles.target_audience: Agency founders and sales leads who do unpaid discovery work
section_outline: Pain — The unpaid scoping problem: hours, win rate, sunk cost (30s)
Agitate — Compounding costs: every lost scope = $X wasted + opportunity cost (40s)
Social Proof Bridge — Same problem, built the solution (30s)
Solution — 4-agent system walkthrough with Fathom + CRM (40s)
Offer — Three tiers, self-install to done-for-you (25s)
Close — ROI guarantee + CTA (20s)
angles.source: Market theme #3 (unpaid scoping) + audience pain language
angles.differentiation: Only angle leading with the financial pain of the SALES process, not delivery. Hits uncompensated pre-sales pain.

angles.hook_line: Your best PM costs you $120K a year. This system lets a junior deliver the same scopes.
angles.framework_detail: Mosing discovery + mechanism → Hormozi value stack + close
angles.target_audience: Growing agencies in hiring mode — founders who need to scale but can't afford/find senior PMs
section_outline: Cold Open — Salary hook: senior PM cost vs system (15s)
The Problem — Hiring bottleneck: can't find/trust/afford (30s)
The Discovery — One person bottleneck on every engagement (30s)
The Mechanism — System as senior PM brain: extraction, scoring, deliverables (40s)
Proof + Value Stack — Demo, 200→20, three tiers (35s)
Risk Reversal + Close — ROI guarantee, CTA (20s)
angles.source: Market theme #4 (junior empowerment) + buying trigger #3 (hiring pain)
angles.differentiation: Only angle framed as people/hiring solution. 'Replace the process not the person.' Appeals to growth-stage agencies.

angles.hook_line: Scope creep just ate your last project's margin. Here's the system that kills it at the source.
angles.target_audience: Agency founders and project leads who've recently had a project blow out — the post-incident buyer
section_outline: Hook — Scope creep ate your margin — pattern interrupt (15s)
Agitate — Why it happens: unclear requirements, undocumented processes (30s)
Prove You Understand — Agency quotes + PMI 2024 stat (25s)
Social Proof — 300+ projects, 5 audits/month, own system (35s)
Offer / Value Stack — Three tiers, citation-backed requirements (30s)
CTA / Guarantee — ROI guarantee, CTA (20s)
angles.source: Buying trigger #1 (scope creep incident) + audience language
angles.differentiation: Only angle targeting a specific incident rather than ongoing process pain. Most urgent/emotional hook.
